ksa_text: Knowledge of Data Protection Impact Assessment requirements, including regulatory triggers that mandate a DPIA, mandatory assessment elements, supervisory authority consultation obligations, and documentation standards.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Edge-domain Regulatory Compliance KSA with insufficient signal strength (composite score 0.434) to justify inclusion for the Data and AI Transformation Lead. Without stronger framework alignment, this knowledge KSA does not meet the inclusion threshold.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.challenge: This Knowledge KSA was excluded as an edge case, yet it has a composite score of 0.434 (moderate signal). Knowledge-dimension KSAs represent conceptual awareness rather than execution; exclusion may be too aggressive.
pass_3_adversarial_internal.rebuttal: Edge-domain Knowledge KSAs require more than moderate signal to justify inclusion; the role's scope does not regularly engage with Regulatory Compliance. Exclusion upheld.
pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: Upheld: edge-domain exclusion maintained. Regulatory Compliance is not sufficiently central to the Data and AI Transformation Lead to warrant inclusion at this signal level.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Could this edge-domain knowledge KSA be expected in real-world Data and AI Transformation Lead roles, even if not core to the role definition?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Job market analysis and framework role definitions confirm Regulatory Compliance is not a standard competency expectation for Data and AI Transformation Lead. Edge-case exclusion is consistent with external evidence.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: external evidence does not support including this edge-domain KSA in the Data and AI Transformation Lead competency profile. Exclusion maintained.

decision_rationale: Insufficient signal (score 0.434) and edge-domain placement (Regulatory Compliance) do not meet inclusion threshold for the Data and AI Transformation Lead. All passes support exclusion.
